title: Grant
description: Properties of a grant that can be granted to a role or user.

grant_option.description: Can grantee pass this privilege down?

grantee_name.description: Specific name of object being granted to

securable_name.description: Name of specific object granted on (not name of privilege!)

granted_by_role_type.description: Type of role that granted this privilege to this grantee

granted_by_name.description: The role that granted this privilege to this grantee
